data.raw_snippet:

As the Global Head of Erection and Commissioning (E\&C) for Gas Service Solutions, you lead and empower a multidisciplinary team responsible for delivering safe, high quality, and timely execution of all erection, installation, and commissioning activities across our solutions project portfolio.

data.raw_snippet:
Org. Setting and Reporting
The Department of Safety and Security (UNDSS) is responsible for providing leadership, operational support and oversight of the United Nations security management system (UNSMS) globally. As a global leader in security risk management principles, UNDSS enables the safe and effective delivery of United Nations programmes and activities in the most complex and challenging environments, while maximizing precious resources. data.title: Senior Director - Global Tech Partners (GTP)
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description**  

Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.


At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world. Join Visa

data.raw_snippet:
**Laboratory Director – AtoG Labs****Location:** Dubai, UAE  

**Reports to:** Board of Directors

**About AtoG Labs:**  

AtoG Labs is a high\-technology molecular diagnostics and genetics laboratory dedicated to advancing personalized medicine in the UAE and beyond. Our multidisciplinary expertise covers molecular biology, genetic sequencing, oncology biomarkers, infectious disease testing, and women’s health diagnostics.
